title: 「all + 分類名詞 + of」句型
titleZh: 「all + 分類名詞 + of」表達「各式各樣／所有類型」

source.file: Sentence Structure 101 -「all + 分類名詞 + of」表達「各式各樣／所有類型」.pdf
omissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules and Benefits explanations are faithful editorial translations.

formula: Subject + verb + all + plural classification word + of + noun + other information

formulas.formula: Subject + verb + all + plural classification word + of + noun + other information
All + plural classification word + of + noun + verb + other information

example: The merchant sells all sorts of jewels.
exampleZh: 這位商人出售各式各樣的珠寶。

examples.en: The merchant sells all sorts of jewels.
examples.zh: 這位商人出售各式各樣的珠寶。

meaning.zh: All 可配合 sorts、kinds、types、forms、varieties、styles、sizes、levels 或 categories of，概括各式各樣或所有已包括的類型。

rules.zh: All 後面的分類名詞一般使用複數形式。
rules.en: The classification word after all normally takes the plural form.

rules.zh: 分類名詞後必須使用 of。
rules.en: The classification word must be followed by of.

rules.zh: Of 後可接複數可數名詞或不可數名詞；初學者應避免在 of 後使用單數可數名詞。
rules.en: Of may be followed by a plural countable noun or an uncountable noun; learners should avoid a singular countable noun after of.

rules.zh: Kinds 和 sorts 自然地表示很多種類；types 著重清楚分類；forms 表示不同方式或表現形式；varieties 表示品種；styles、sizes、levels 和 categories 指出特定分類標準。
rules.en: Kinds and sorts naturally express many varieties; types stresses clear classification; forms describes different modes of appearance; varieties refers to varieties within a class; styles, sizes, levels and categories identify a specific basis for classification.

rules.zh: 整個詞組作主語時，分類名詞本身是複數，後面的動詞通常也使用複數。
rules.en: When the whole phrase is the subject, the plural classification word normally takes a plural verb.
examples: All kinds of books are available.
All forms of payment are accepted.

rules.zh: 日常英語中的 all kinds of 和 all sorts of 經常表示很多不同種類，不一定真的包括世上每一種；較明確範圍內的 all types/forms/varieties of 較常表示所有已列明類型。
rules.en: In everyday English, all kinds of and all sorts of often means many different kinds rather than literally every possible kind; within a clearly defined range, all types/forms/varieties of more often refers to every listed type.
examples: We discussed all sorts of problems.

benefits.zh: 一個短語便可概括很多不同例子，不必列出很長清單。
benefits.en: One short phrase can summarise many different examples without a long list.

benefits.zh: 選擇 types、forms、varieties、styles 等分類詞，可以準確指出分類方法。
benefits.en: Choosing types, forms, varieties, styles or another category word clearly identifies how the items are classified.

benefits.zh: 當不需要逐一說出每個例子時，這個句型可避免句子冗長。
benefits.en: When individual examples are unnecessary, the structure prevents an overlong sentence.

benefits.zh: All kinds/forms/types of 可取代重複的 many different、a lot of different 或 various，增加句式變化。
benefits.en: All kinds/forms/types of adds variety instead of repeatedly using many different, a lot of different or various.

benefits.zh: 把分類範圍放在句首能先突出種類，再說明主要信息，適合規則、報告、簡報和說明文章。
benefits.en: Placing the category phrase first highlights the range before the main message, which suits rules, reports, presentations and explanatory writing.

sourceOmissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules and Benefits explanations are faithful editorial translations.

en: Rewrite each sentence using an appropriate all + classification word + of structure.
Preserve the original category word and meaning as closely as possible.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用合適的 all + 分類名詞 + of 結構改寫以下句子。
請盡量保留原句的分類概念和意思。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: The shop sells bags of many different kinds.
questions.promptZh: 這間店售賣很多不同種類的袋。
questions.answer: The shop sells all kinds of bags.
questions.answerZh: 這間店售賣各式各樣的袋。
questions.highlight: The shop sells all kinds of bags.
